requirement_topic.en: SNI Marking and IEC 62109 Safety Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: SNI 标志与 IEC 62109 安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: SNI 標誌與 IEC 62109 安全證據

summary.en: Indonesia uses SNI as the national standards system. For PV inverters, SNI IEC 62109 safety evidence is a relevant route for photovoltaic power-converter safety, but the mandatory legal trigger depends on whether the current Indonesian mandatory-SNI list and implementing ministry regulation cover the exact inverter category, rating, and import route. Do not apply the SNI mark or describe whole-unit certification as compulsory unless the model is confirmed in scope.
summary.zh: 印度尼西亚采用 SNI 作为国家标准体系。对于光伏逆变器，SNI IEC 62109 安全证据是光伏功率变换器安全的相关路径，但强制法律触发取决于现行印度尼西亚强制 SNI 清单及实施部门规章是否覆盖具体逆变器类别、额定值和进口路径。除非确认型号落入范围，不应使用 SNI 标志或将整机认证描述为强制。
summary.zht: 印尼採用 SNI 作為國家標準體系。對於光伏逆變器，SNI IEC 62109 安全證據是光伏功率變換器安全的相關路徑，但強制法律觸發取決於現行印尼強制 SNI 清單及實施部門規章是否覆蓋具體逆變器類別、額定值和進口路徑。除非確認型號落入範圍，不應使用 SNI 標誌或將整機認證描述為強制。

standards_or_laws: SNI IEC 62109 series for safety of power converters for photovoltaic power systems
BSN SNI catalogue and Indonesian mandatory-SNI implementation lists
Product-specific ministry regulation where an SNI is made mandatory

summary.en: China-market files commonly cite GB/T 37408 for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter technical requirements, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverter specifications, and IEC 62109 CB Scheme reports. These can support technical review but do not authorize Indonesia SNI marking or replace an Indonesian scope decision.
summary.zh: 中国市场文件通常引用 GB/T 37408 光伏并网逆变器技术要求、NB/T 32004 光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及 IEC 62109 CB 体系报告。这些资料可支持技术审查，但不能授权使用印度尼西亚 SNI 标志，也不能替代印度尼西亚适用范围判断。
summary.zht: 中國市場文件通常引用 GB/T 37408 光伏併網逆變器技術要求、NB/T 32004 光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及 IEC 62109 CB 體系報告。這些資料可支持技術審查，但不能授權使用印尼 SNI 標誌，也不能替代印尼適用範圍判斷。

gap.en: The gap is scope and mark control. Prepare SNI IEC 62109 test evidence and Indonesian importer documentation, but first verify the current mandatory-SNI scope before claiming that every solar inverter whole unit must carry SNI marking.
gap.zh: 差距在于适用范围和标志控制。应准备 SNI IEC 62109 测试证据和印度尼西亚进口商资料，但在声称每台太阳能逆变器整机必须加贴 SNI 标志前，应先核实现行强制 SNI 适用范围。
gap.zht: 差距在於適用範圍和標誌控制。應準備 SNI IEC 62109 測試證據和印尼進口商資料，但在聲稱每台太陽能逆變器整機必須加貼 SNI 標誌前，應先核實現行強制 SNI 適用範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the current Indonesian mandatory-SNI regulation covers the exact inverter product; otherwise SNI IEC 62109 evidence may be a voluntary, tender, utility, or customer requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary for Indonesian entry unless accepted as supporting evidence; China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, CGC, CE, or CB evidence does not authorize SNI marking

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SNI IEC 62109 as the Indonesia-facing safety evidence route, but verify mandatory-SNI scope before marking the product or presenting whole-unit certification as compulsory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将 SNI IEC 62109 作为面向印度尼西亚的安全证据路径，但在加贴标志或将整机认证表述为强制前，必须核验强制 SNI 适用范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將 SNI IEC 62109 作為面向印尼的安全證據路徑，但在加貼標誌或將整機認證表述為強制前，必須核驗強制 SNI 適用範圍。
